heading: Three honeymoon paths
intro: Ranges, not fixed prices — your quote depends on dates, villa type, and availability.

categories.name: Quiet, Couples-Focused Resort
categories.description: No kids' club, no family pool crowds — a resort culture built entirely around couples and quiet.

categories.name: Water Villa Resort
categories.description: Direct lagoon access, often a private deck and plunge pool — the classic honeymoon image, for good reason.

categories.name: Private-Island Ultra-Luxury
categories.description: Full villa privacy, butler service, private dining anywhere on the resort — for a once-in-a-lifetime budget.
